candidates.title: 360° VR Hawai'i Wedding Video Editing
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have an entire beach & mountains wedding day captured in stitched-ready 360° footage and now need it shaped into a romantic, emotionally-driven story that guests can relive inside a headset or on a phone. The idea is to open with a concise highlight reel that flows gracefully through the day, then let viewers dive into separate, fully-edited clips for every key moment. Collaboration is important to me, I value clear communication & hope my feedback will be welcome at every stage. Here’s what I will hand over: * Raw 360° files covering a pre-ceremony women’s blessing circle, arch creation (& removal), the full ceremony, the welcoming-with-bubbles to the reception, reception highlights, & including full video of each singer and speaker. * Ambient audio tracks and the RAV pan drum music we want woven underneath … What I need back: * A polished highlight reel (6–8 min range) paced for emot

candidates.title: Create Professional Shopify App Store Demo Video — Avatar Intro + Website/App Walkthrough
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: Project Title: Create Professional Shopify App Store Demo Video — Avatar Intro + Website/App Walkthrough Project Description: We are looking for an experienced SaaS/product video creator to produce a professional demo video for our Shopify App Store listing. The product is DisputeDesk, a Shopify app that helps merchants manage chargebacks and build structured dispute evidence. We already have a rough screen recording / YouTube demo, but we want the final result to feel much more professional, clear, and suitable for a Shopify App Store product listing. The video should NOT simply be a raw screen recording. We want a polished product introduction video with an avatar presenter, voiceover, website walkthrough, app walkthrough, zooms, callouts, and clean transitions. Video structure we want: 1. candidates.title: Polish Three Podcast Episodes
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have three interview-style podcast recordings that now sit as 30-minute raw video files with the external audio captured separately. I need each one shaped into a tight 15–20 minute episode that looks and sounds ready for immediate release on YouTube and the usual podcast platforms. Here is what I’m after: trim the conversations so they flow, sync and splice the clean mic track, remove any obvious stumbles or long pauses, add gentle noise reduction and mastering, then colour-grade the footage so every shot matches smoothly. Because I don’t yet have background music picked out, I’d like you to suggest a short professional, neutral bed that can sit quietly under the intro, mid-roll break (if you feel one is useful), and outro. Feel free to use tasteful transition effects or subtle SFX where they help; if something stands out as unnecessary, leave it out—I trust your editorial judgement o

candidates.title: Customer-Focused Promo Video Edit
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have existing footage and brand assets that need to be shaped into a polished promotional video aimed squarely at our customers. The edit should feel energetic yet trustworthy, reflecting our brand personality from the very first frame. Here’s what I need you to handle from start to finish: select the strongest takes, craft a tight storyline, colour-grade for a consistent look, add on-brand motion graphics or lower thirds, mix the audio so dialogue and music sit perfectly together, and deliver a final master in 1080p and 4K. You can work in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve—whichever lets you move fastest without compromising quality. After Effects accents for logo animations are welcome if they elevate the piece. I’ll supply the raw clips, our logo pack, the brand colour codes, a preferred music track, and the key message we want viewers to remember. You return: • One

candidates.title: Capture High-Quality Raw Gameplay
candidates.brief: Need several hours of clean, unedited gameplay footage that I can later cut into trailers and tutorials. The platform, genre, and specific titles are flexible—PC, console, or mobile work for me so long as the result looks crisp and runs smoothly. What matters most is: • Native resolution capture (1080p minimum, 60 fps preferred) • No watermarks, commentary, or on-screen overlays—pure in-game audio only • Consistent file naming and lossless or lightly compressed formats (ProRes, DNxHD, or high-bit-rate MP4) • Delivery via Google Drive or similar cloud link, with session notes that list the game, mode, and approximate timestamps of key moments OBS Studio, NVIDIA ShadowPlay, Elgato, or comparable capture solutions are all acceptable as long as they meet the quality targets above. If you already have access to a popular or recently released game that you think would showcase well, let me kno

candidates.title: AI-powered Short / Reel Video Creation
candidates.brief: Looking for a creative AI video creator who can recreate viral videos from YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels. *Please share your best quotation Reference Style: * Sample 1: https://www.instagram.com/reel/DY6Wu9XTehd/ * Sample 2: https://www.instagram.com/reel/DYuk6Y1TLJb/ What I Need: * Recreate similar style videos using AI tools/models * Better visual quality and smooth animations * Good background music + clean audio * Videos should feel engaging enough for YouTube Shorts * Duration usually 20–45 seconds Important: * I will provide reference viral videos/content ideas * You can use any AI tools/models/software you prefer * Final output should look polished and social-media ready Before Hiring: * I would like to see a small sample/demo first * We can do a quick remote screen-sharing session to review your workflow/output quality This can become a long-term project: * Around 30 videos
